title: helianthus tenellus
intro: Helianthus tenellus, also known as the slender sunflower or thin-leaved sunflower, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus tenellus include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
